title: Mellow Indian Vermicelli Wrap
description: A winey, crumbly, indulgent wrap that combines rice vermicelli, roasted chickpeas, feta, and boiled eggs in a fresh lettuce bundle.
instructions: Boil the rice vermicelli in salted water for 5 minutes until al dente, then drain and rinse with cold water.
Toss the vermicelli with olive oil, lemon juice, salt, cumin, and chopped mint to coat evenly.
Heat the red wine in a small saucepan until it reduces by half, then mix it into the vermicelli.
Spread the lettuce leaves on a clean surface and arrange a handful of vermicelli on each leaf.
Top the vermicelli with roasted chickpeas, crumbled feta, and sliced boiled egg rounds.
Fold the sides of the lettuce over the filling and roll tightly to form a wrap.
Serve immediately, optionally drizzling a little extra wine reduction over the top.
Enjoy while warm for a creamy, indulgent lunch.
